yaml.title: Techniques - Theoretical & Experimental
yaml.subtitle: Synthesis, characterization, and theoretical calculation techniques acquired over two decades of condensed matter and particle physics research.

markdown.markdown:
### Detector & Experimental Systems
- Optical calibration systems
- Firmware, Raspberry Pi, microcontroller
- IceCube DAQ systems
- Signal reconstruction & noise modeling

### Analysis-related
- Python, C++
- statistical analytical methods
- Machine Learning with Scikit-learn and TensorFlow
- Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs, ~image recognition)




## Condensed-Matter Relevant

<!-- ### Electronic Structure Calculations
- [Density Functional Theory](dft.qmd) -->

### Materials Synthesis
- [Solid-state reaction (polycrystalline pellets)](solidstatereaction.qmd)
- [Flux growth of Single Crystals](flux.qmd)
- Crystal polishing and surface preparation
- [Arc-melter (polyxtal intermetallics)](arcmelter.qmd)
- Chemical vapor transport (CVT)

![*Inside crystal growth lab at Chung-Ang University — 2017*](images/profile3.jpg){style="float:right; margin-left:20px; width:250px;"}

### Structural & Chemical Characterization
- [Powder X-ray diffraction (XRD)](powderxrd.qmd)
- SEM / EDX
- [Atomic Force Microscope (AFM)](afm.qmd)


### Electronic & Magnetic Measurements
- SQUID magnetometry (dc and ac)
- Hall effect measurements
- Four-point probe transport


### Special Characterization
- [Specific Heat Capacity (PPMS 2-tau relaxation)](specheat.qmd)
- Nuclear Magnetic Resonance (NMR) 
- Muon Spin Rotation ($\mu$SR)


### Low-Temperature & Cryogenics
- Quantum Design cryostats
- Liquid helium systems (with Liq-N jackets)
- Measurements on crystalline samples down to 1.8 K
